title: Wit Punished Prospers Most
content:
Dread not the shackles; on with thine intent,
Good wits get more fame by their punishment.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Wit Punished Prospers Most"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
